common.name: Name
panel.header.desc: Scan images from the current SiYuan document context, then upload, replace, and track migrations in one place.
panel.hint.settings: Manage CloudFlare-ImgBed endpoints, public domains, and upload parameters in one place.
panel.hint.upload: Best for dragging local files into a queue, independent from note image scanning.
panel.hint.misc: Keep upload mappings for troubleshooting and history reuse.
panel.hint.replacePreview: Replace preview mode is active. Only images waiting to be written back are shown.
panel.hint.images: Filter images by source, then batch upload or replace them manually.
panel.sidebar.scope.title: Current Scope
panel.sidebar.scope.desc: Only process Markdown / HTML image links from the active document.
panel.sidebar.quick.title: Quick Actions
panel.sidebar.config.title: Active Config
panel.sidebar.config.empty: No available config. Set one up in Configs first.
panel.sidebar.rules.title: Rules
settings.panel.title: Image Bed Panel
settings.panel.description: Inspect images in the current note, then filter, upload, and replace them.
settings.config.title: CloudFlare-ImgBed Config
settings.config.description: Supports multiple configs, custom own-bed domains, and auto replacement after upload.
settings.upload.title: Local Image Upload
settings.upload.description: Open the upload queue directly and drag local images into the current config.
settings.mappings.title: Mappings
settings.mappings.description: Inspect upload mappings, export JSON/CSV, and troubleshoot replacements.
settings.view.title: Configs
settings.view.desc: Maintain upload endpoints, public domains, and channel parameters.
images.title: Images
images.empty.title: No image results are available for the current document
images.empty.desc: Click Refresh Scan and image resources from the current note will appear here.
image.replacePreview.title: Replace Preview
image.replacePreview.subtitle: {count} locations pending replacement
image.references.title: References
image.references.subtitle: {count} references
image.references.openBlock: Click to jump to the referenced block
image.message.noContext: Plugin context is unavailable, cannot jump
upload.title: Upload Images
upload.desc: Drag or choose images to add them to the queue. Supports concurrent upload, retry, and logs.
upload.dropDesc: Supports png / jpg / gif / webp and other image files
upload.queue.title: Upload Queue
upload.queue.desc: Local images enter here so you can review the state before uploading.
upload.queue.emptyDesc: Drag local images here or click Choose Images.
upload.log.title: Upload Logs
upload.log.desc: Review status changes, success records, and failure reasons during upload.
upload.log.emptyDesc: Logs will appear here after uploads start.
tasks.title: Task Center
mappings.title: Mappings
mappings.desc: Keep original links and uploaded links, with search, copy, and export support.
mappings.searchPlaceholder: Search local link / uploaded link / file name
mappings.emptyDesc: Original links and uploaded links will be recorded here after successful uploads.
mappings.preview.none: There are no uploaded images available for replacement right now
config.section.access.title: Access & Identity
config.section.access.desc: Define the endpoint, public domain, and target upload channel.
config.section.authReturn.title: Auth & Response
config.section.authReturn.desc: Control credentials, upload folder, and returned link format.
config.section.strategy.title: Upload Strategy
config.section.strategy.desc: Control chunked uploads and retry behavior for large files.
config.autoRetry.on: Auto retry on failure is enabled
config.autoRetry.off: Auto retry on failure is disabled
config.huggingFace.chunkNote: For Hugging Face, large-file handling is performed server-side, so client chunking is unnecessary.
config.chunkNote.direct: This channel does not use client-side chunking by default.
config.warning.host: Host is empty. This config cannot upload right now.
config.warning.auth: Token or auth code is missing. Add one if your instance requires authentication.
config.warning.publicDomain: A full URL is recommended for the public domain to avoid invalid returned links.
scanner.error.noReplaceableLinks: No uploaded links are available for replacement
uploader.error.cannotClearQueue: Cannot clear the queue while uploading
uploader.log.queueHitHistory: {name} matched upload history and was skipped
uploader.log.imageHitHistory: Image matched upload history and was skipped: {url}
uploader.error.noQueueFiles: No queue files are available to upload
uploader.error.noImagesForScope: No images match the selected upload scope
uploader.error.noFailedImages: No failed images are available to retry
uploader.error.noFailedQueueFiles: No failed queue files are available to retry
upload.error.noImageUrl: No image URL was parsed from the response
upload.error.mergeNoUrl: No image URL returned after chunk merge
upload.error.hostMissing: Image bed host is not configured
upload.test.siteAccessibleLimited: Site is reachable, but authentication may be restricted
command.refreshCurrentDoc: Refresh and open current document images in CloudFlare ImgBed
